_note: Cascade retrofit of lighting-layout/examples/uk-open-plan-office-10x8-dali (the Sprint D3 canonical). 20 LED_PANEL_600 (6000 lm each, DALI-controlled) on 4×5 grid in 10×8 m open-plan office. All 9 INVs PASS — happy-path cascade with comfortable margin (50% over 500 target). 10-sample slice from the 99-point grid. This is the post-D.2 retrofit complement to the C.1 standalone example uk-open-plan-office-10x8-dali-photometric — same engineering math; this cascade version points consumed_intents.source_path at the real lighting-layout example (the standalone uses a same-named-but-synthetic upstream).

consumed_summary._layout_note: Sprint D3 canonical: 4 rows × 5 cols, panels at x ∈ {1000, 3000, 5000, 7000, 9000} × y ∈ {1000, 3000, 5000, 7000}. DALI master control; 5 row-circuits (C-L01..C-L05) per the D3 INV-4 Z-pattern-topology fix. Part L compliant via DALI + daylight-link + occupancy-sensing on perimeter zone.

ies_files._source: Synthetic 600x600mm recessed LED panel, 6000lm, 4000K, opal diffuser. Distribution: Lambertian cos(theta) per CIBSE LG7 §6.2 typical opal panel. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3 — generated by scripts/generate_reference_ies.py. Engineer must substitute project IES.

grid_metadata.grid_spacing_formula: BS EN 12464-1:2021 §6.2 adaptive: p = 0.2 × 5^log₁₀(d) clamped [50, 1000] mm; for d=9.0m task area: p ≈ 0.2 × 5^0.954 × 1000 ≈ 929 mm → snapped to nominal 900 mm. Grid fitted to task area: 11 cols × 9 rows = 99 points (x-step 900, y-step 875 to fit 7000mm y-extent exactly).

reflectances._source: CIBSE LG7 §6.2 clean office reflectances (0.7/0.5/0.2) — matches lighting-layout assumptions.

rationale.chat_summary: Cascade retrofit of D3 canonical lighting-layout uk-open-plan-office-10x8-dali. 20 LED_PANEL_600 (6000 lm) on 4×5 grid produce achieved_avg 752 lux (50% margin over 500 target) with achieved_min 612 lux ≥ 350 (0.7×500); U₀ 0.81 ≥ 0.6 office target; max UGR 18.2 ≤ 19 office limit. All 9 INVs PASS. Intent payload sets task_area_compliant=true for upstream lighting-layout INV-11. This is the post-D.2 cascade retrofit version of the C.1 standalone example.

sections.title: Cascade context — D3 canonical
sections.summary: Consumes electrical/lighting-layout/examples/uk-open-plan-office-10x8-dali/intent-out.json — the Sprint D3 canonical lighting-layout example. The lighting-layout v1.4.0 shipped with INV-11 as a placeholder; this cascade (post-D.2 retrofit) wires up INV-11 to actually consume the photometric_grid intent. The math is identical to the C.1 standalone example uk-open-plan-office-10x8-dali-photometric — see that example's reasoning.md for full per-step derivations. The DIFFERENCE: this cascade points consumed_intents.source_path at the real lighting-layout example, while the standalone used a same-named-but-synthetic upstream intent file.

sections.title: Grid resolution derivation
sections.summary: Task area 9×7 m after 500mm border per BS EN 12464-1 §4.3. d=9m; corrected §6.2 formula p ≈ 929 mm snapped to 900 mm per [grid-spacing-rules#adaptive-formula]. 11×9 = 99 grid points (x-step 900, y-step 875). Identical to cascade-office-open-plan and cascade-uk-multi-entrance-classroom.

sections.title: Per-point illuminance — 50% margin design
sections.summary: achieved_avg 752 lux (50% margin over 500 target). achieved_min 612 lux at NW corner (500, 7500); well above the 350 threshold. The 6000 lm panel (vs the 4500 lm panel in cascade-office-open-plan) gives the comfortable margin. This is the D3 canonical's design intent: deliberate over-spec for DALI-controlled comfort dimming during normal operation, with full 6000 lm available on photometric calc day (the worst-case static condition).

sections.title: UGR per CIE 117
sections.summary: Max UGR 18.2 (auto_S_wall observer at (5000, 1500)) ≤ 19 office limit per BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3 row 5.34 open_plan_office; PASS with 0.8 margin. The D3 canonical's panel is the synthetic LED_PANEL_600.ies (6000 lm Lambertian); UGR is per-luminaire-luminance-driven and within the 19 limit despite the higher lumen count vs cascade-office-open-plan (4500 lm).

sections.title: DALI control overlay (informational)
sections.summary: Upstream specifies DALI master control with daylight-linking + occupancy-sensing on perimeter zone. Photometric-analysis verifies full output (the worst-case static snapshot, matching the convention from cascade-reception-lobby and cascade-uk-multi-entrance-classroom). DALI is a Part L energy-saving overlay, not a compliance-loosening device; lighting-layout's own INV-06 confirms Part L compliance.

sections.title: Cascade signal
sections.summary: Intent payload sets task_area_compliant=true and non_compliance_flags=[]; lighting-layout INV-11 PASSes its photometric verification. The D3 canonical full_drawing IR is sign-off-ready for the photometric dimension.

sections.title: Honest disclosure — cascade vs standalone
sections.summary: IES file is the same synthetic_reference_C3 LED_PANEL_600.ies used by the C.1 standalone example. The math (752/612/891/0.81/18.2) is identical. The difference is the cascade contract resolution: this example points at the REAL lighting-layout example's intent-out.json, while the standalone used a same-named-but-synthetic upstream intent file. The cascade contract integrity is verified by Pass 4 of the golden CI gate (intent-out validation against photometric-grid-intent.schema.json).

invariants.evidence: Achieved min 612 lux ≥ 0.7 × target 500 = 350 lux per BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3 + §4.4. Cold point at (500, 7500) NW corner; 262 lux margin over threshold (comfortable D3 canonical 50% over-spec).
Achieved U₀ = 612/752 = 0.814 ≥ 0.6 office target per [ugr-rules#per-room-type-limits] open_plan_office. Spatial distribution from synthetic Lambertian IES is smooth across the uniform 4×5 grid.
Max UGR 18.2 (auto_S_wall observer at (5000, 1500)) ≤ 19 office limit per BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3 row 5.34 open_plan_office. 0.8 margin.
1 distinct luminaire_type (LED_PANEL_600) in upstream lighting-layout consumed_summary; 1 ies_files[] entry matches; LM-63 parser returns total_lumens=6000 + max_intensity_cd=1850.
grid_spacing_mm=900 matches BS EN 12464-1 §6.2 formula output p ≈ 929 mm within ±50 mm tolerance. d=9.0m task area.
illuminance_grid.length (full runtime emission) = point_count=99. 10-sample slice in this IR; every (x_mm, y_mm) inside task_area_bounds [500,9500]×[500,7500]. No duplicate coordinates.
4 ugr_results entries with _source=cie_117_default (N, S, E, W wall-facing per [ugr-rules#default-observer-positions]). No engineer overrides supplied in inputs.ugr_view_positions_override[].
ies_files[0]._source length=270 chars ≥ 40 minimum; verification_status=synthetic_reference_C3 in enum per [ies-provenance-rules#verification-status-enum].
